description: In-progress implementation — produce handoff with decisions, open questions, and first next step
input: Write a handoff note for this session. I've implemented the JWT refresh token logic (done), but the revocation endpoint is still in progress. I decided to use Redis for token storage but haven't decided on TTL. The test file is missing coverage for the revocation path.
